title: How to get a police certificate – Malta - Canada.ca
content:
## How to get a police certificate – Malta
If you need to give your fingerprints for a police certificate, this isn’t the same as giving your biometrics (fingerprints and photo) for an application.

## Name of the document you need
Certifikat tal-Kondotta/Certificate of Conduct (Form A)

## Police certificate and IRCC requirements
You must provide a police certificate when you apply for:
- some temporary residence programs
Check your application package or instructions for details.
Apply online with the Malta Police Force or in person at the Criminal Records Office in Floriana (check Contact information for complete details).
If you’re a citizen of Malta, you must sign in to the Government of Malta’s identification portal with your e-ID account and Maltese ID card or residence permit. For information on how to get an e-ID account, please check the frequently asked questions .
Criminal  Records Office Police Headquarters
St. Calcedonius Square Floriana FRN 1530 Malta Phone: +356 2294 2261 or +356 2294 2262 Fax: +356 2294 2678 Email: cro.police@gov.mt
